project_type: Next.js landing page with Linear-style design
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify the project compiles without errors
environment_constraints: Node.js v22 available, full internet access (OPEN_INTERNET), npm/pnpm/yarn available
key_patterns: Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Inter font from next/font/google, dark theme with purple/blue gradient accents, glassmorphism, smooth transitions
directory_structure: Standard Next.js App Router structure: app/ for pages and layouts, components/ for reusable UI components, public/ for static assets, tailwind.config.ts for theme configuration
